summary: A rebroadcast Fox News panel segment (Kayleigh McEnany on 'Outnumbered') discussing the DHS-IRS deal to share taxpayer data to locate illegal immigrants for deportation, intercut with enforcement B-roll. It is a raw TV news/commentary clip, not music-driven produced entertainment.
notable_text: DHS & IRS REACH DEAL TO AID DEPORTATIONS; IRS AND DHS REACH HISTORIC DEAL TO AID IN PURSUIT OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS SUBJECT TO DEPORTATION; FOX NEWS ALERT
